title: Flaky Russian Cream Cheese Crumble
description: A crowd-pleasing baked dish featuring cream cheese and a flaky texture, perfect for breakfast or dessert.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 8x8 inch baking dish with cooking spray or butter.
In a large mixing bowl, cream together the Cream Cheese and Heavy Cream until well combined. Add Granulated Sugar and mix on medium speed for about 2 minutes, scraping down the sides as needed.
Add in Egg and stir to combine fully. Gradually add in All-Purpose Flour, Baking Powder, and Salt, stirring with a wooden spoon or spatula until just combined.
Transfer the mixture into your prepared baking dish and bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and firm when touched in the center.
Allow to cool slightly before serving. Garnish with additional Sugar if desired.
